title: Automate Scheduling for nth Occurrence of Weekday
excerpt: I’m currently working on automating a task that needs to be scheduled on the first and third Wednesday of every month. While I’ve found methods to create recurring events based on specific days of the month (like the 15t…

posts.author: danielshort (Daniel Short)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m currently working on automating a task that needs to be scheduled on the first and third Wednesday of every month. While I’ve found methods to create recurring events based on specific days of the month (like the 15th or 30th) or on a biweekly basis, I am struggling to find a solution that allows for scheduling based on the occurrence of a particular weekday within a month.

I would like to propose the addition of a feature that enables users to create recurring events that trigger on the nth occurrence of a specific weekday. In my case, this would be the first and third Wednesday of each month. The available scheduling tools I’ve encountered seem limited to setting events on specific days of the month (e.g., the 1st or 15th) or recurring every certain number of weeks, without accounting for how many times that weekday has appeared within a month.

posts.author: workflowboost (Bartosz @ Workflow Boost)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey! While this isn’t a native feature in monday yet, you can use the Advanced Time Triggers app. It introduces automation recipes for triggering actions on specific weekdays of the month, quarter, or year.
